@graph.name: TOXFREE® LSZH XZ1 AL
@graph.description: Screened LSZH power cable with aluminium conductor. ACCORDING TO: UNE-HD 603-5x. TOXFREE® LSZH XZ1 AL is a screened LSZH safety cable. In the event of fire, it does not emit toxic gases, nor does it give off corrosive gases, avoiding any possible damage to people or electronic equipment. Designed for fixed installations in public low-voltage distribution networks, suitable for industrial, solar photovoltaic and power distribution applications.
@graph.category: Hardware > Building Materials > Wiring & Cables > Electrical Cables

audience.audienceType: Electrical Distributors, Electrical Installers, Engineers (Public Buildings & Hospitals), Engineers (Industrial Projects), Data Centre Operators, Data Centre Design Consultants, Data Centre Contractors, Data Centre Installers

subjectOf.name: Technical Datasheet - TOXFREE® LSZH XZ1 AL
subjectOf.description: Complete technical specifications, engineering data and certifications for the cable.

additionalProperty.name: Conductor
additionalProperty.value: Aluminium, class 2 according to EN 60228 and IEC 60228

additionalProperty.name: Insulation
additionalProperty.value: Cross-linked polyethylene type XLPE according to UNE-HD 603-5x

additionalProperty.name: Screen
additionalProperty.value: Overlapping aluminium-polyester tape with 100% coverage plus tinned copper drain wire

additionalProperty.name: Outer Sheath
additionalProperty.value: Low smoke halogen free polyolefin. Black colour

additionalProperty.name: Flame Non-Propagation
additionalProperty.value: Flame non-propagation according to EN 60332-1 / IEC 60332-1

additionalProperty.name: CPR Classification
additionalProperty.value: Eca according to EN 50575

additionalProperty.name: Halogen Free
additionalProperty.value: Halogen free according to EN 60754-1 / IEC 60754-1

additionalProperty.name: Low Corrosive Gases Emission
additionalProperty.value: Low corrosive gases emission according to EN 60754-2 / IEC 60754-2

additionalProperty.name: Minimum Bending Radius
additionalProperty.value: 15x cable diameter

additionalProperty.name: Impact Resistance
additionalProperty.value: AG2 Medium severity

additionalProperty.name: Chemical & Oil Resistance
additionalProperty.value: Acceptable

additionalProperty.name: UV Resistance
additionalProperty.value: UV Resistant according to HD 603-1

additionalProperty.name: Installation Conditions
additionalProperty.value: Open Air. Buried. In conduit.

additionalProperty.name: Standards (According To)
additionalProperty.value: UNE-HD 603-5x

additionalProperty.name: Standards and Approvals
additionalProperty.value: AENOR, RoHS, CE

additionalProperty.name: Typical Applications
additionalProperty.value: Power distribution, Industrial facilities, Buried PV installations
